nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: Who are you, and why have you come to the Ancient Tomb? No one has set foot here for many years.

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: I am Xiao Longnv, successor of the Ancient Tomb Sect. I've been guarding the Go puzzle mechanism left by my master. Have you also come for that puzzle?

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: The Ancient Tomb Sect has a technique called 'Jade Maiden Heart Manual.' The mental cultivation within, when applied to Go, allows you to maintain a mind like still water, undisturbed by external interference.

options.text: I want to learn the 'Jade Maiden Heart Manual'
Miss, I'd like to play another game with you
What is the Jade Maiden Heart Manual?

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: The 'Jade Maiden Heart Manual' is the Ancient Tomb Sect's supreme mental cultivation, emphasizing a mind like still water, unmoved by external things. In Go, it allows you to stay calm and unaffected by your opponent's interference.

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: This technique allows you to concentrate completely during a game, see through your opponent's intentions, and make the best responses. However, it requires extremely high mental cultivation.

options.text: Exquisitely profound! Please teach me, Miss

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: Very well. However, not everyone can learn this mental cultivation. If you want to learn, you must play a game with me first to prove you have the aptitude.

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: I've guarded the Go puzzle in the Ancient Tomb for many years - my Go skill has reached a transcendent state. If you can beat me, it proves your mental state is sufficient.

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: Your Go skill is impressive, and more rare is your clear mental state. In that case, I'll teach you the essence of the 'Jade Maiden Heart Manual.'

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: during a game, maintain a mind like still water, unmoved by external things, thus seeing through your opponent's intentions. Can be used once per game with a 35-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: Remember, 'if the heart is clear as ice, heaven's collapse won't startle.' When using this technique, cast aside all distracting thoughts to unleash its maximum power.

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: Now that you've learned this technique, you can calmly handle strong enemies in the future. Guo'er was right - for true masters, it's a contest of mental states.

options.text: I'd like to hear more of your insights
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: Your mental state is not yet sufficient. Cultivate in the Ancient Tomb for a while longer - perhaps you'll have a breakthrough.

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: I've lived in the Ancient Tomb for many years, far from the mortal world. Master said that clearing the heart of desires is how one cultivates to the highest realm.

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: But since meeting Guo'er, I've come to understand that some things are more important than martial arts. The same goes for Go - you can't only pursue winning and losing.

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: Very well. Come back when you're ready.

nodes.speaker: Xiao Longnv
nodes.text: You may go. The Ancient Tomb is peaceful and not suitable for long stays.
